run.input: Only the 22 skill names and frontmatter descriptions after the metadata diet
run.method: For each prompt, select the single best skill without opening any SKILL.md body. Boundary probes intentionally resemble a neighboring skill. Observed values record this review run and must be rerun when routing metadata changes.

cases.prompt: The feature workspace and tasks already exist. Implement every task autonomously, test it, open the PR, handle feedback, and merge.
Let's explore and design a feature, turn the tradeoffs into an OpenSpec proposal, and review it together before coding.
How does AEP resolve the integration branch, name worktrees, and recover a broken feature worktree?
The design is approved. Create its isolated worktree and spawn a Codex implementation agent with an evaluator.
The PR merged; archive the OpenSpec change, converge the records, and remove the feature workspace.
Run the entire remaining layer hands-free, dispatching and monitoring multiple stories through merge and cleanup.
Audit this product UI for usability, accessibility, and heuristic issues and assign severity scores.
Which executor backend should launch this workspace agent under Codex, and how do I check that the spawn is alive?
Define a reusable generator/evaluator contract, scoring framework, findings format, and recovery ladder for artifacts.
Capture the process lessons from this downstream build and route them upstream into AEP.
This task is too large for one context; author a deterministic multi-agent harness to execute and verify it.
Agents cannot judge our visual quality bar. Capture my decisions in a design-dimension brief before the alignment layer.
Sync the signals, score the ready queue, and pick the single next story for the feature lifecycle.
Validate whether this product idea is worth pursuing and frame the opportunity for downstream planning.
Decompose the product context into modules, a layered story graph, dependencies, and an agent topology.
Before UI stories start, create an OOUX object map and noun-first information architecture.
Classify what we learned after shipping and route it back to the story graph, architecture, or opportunity hypothesis.
Run a generator/evaluator dry-run against this completed product-context artifact and fix only that artifact.
Continuously ingest telemetry and error streams, deduplicate findings, and create refinement stories in the backlog.
Upgrade our thin bash e2e-test skill into a three-tier BDD journey and layer-gate structure.
I'm new to AEP. Install the plugin, verify the required tools, configure it, and explain the mental model.
Create a new AEP application with OpenSpec, workspace hooks, and the canonical testing infrastructure.
我第一次接觸 AEP，先幫我安裝、檢查工具並解釋整體工作方式，不要建立新專案。
AEP 已經裝好了，請修復這個既有專案分裂的 .claude/.agents skills layout。
只挑一個現在最適合做的 story，交給下一個 feature 階段，不要持續跑。
不用再問我，連續把這一層的多個 stories 從派工一路監控到收尾。
請依可用性與 accessibility heuristics 審查這個現有介面並標嚴重度。
這不是要做 usability audit；請把我對品牌視覺好壞的主觀判斷整理成 agents 能用的標準。
Use the existing gen/eval protocol now to validate this specific architecture document.
Review this completed implementation against its spec, run focused checks, and report concrete code defects; do not design a reusable evaluation framework.
Validate this RFC as an executable document: check its claims against the repository and identify missing migration steps.
Design the reusable scoring and agent-contract pattern that other validation workflows should consult.
請為這個超出單一 context 的任務寫一個可重跑的 multi-agent workflow。
workflow 已經跑完了，現在把這次流程上的教訓整理並回送到 AEP。
The story graph exists; derive the UI nouns, relationships, and object map before dispatching its screens.
Monitoring already produced one concrete observation; classify that learning and decide which product phase changes.
